emails.subject: Database Port Update Required
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

We're migrating the production database to a new cluster this weekend. As part of the migration, we need all application servers to connect on port 5433 instead of the current port.

Could you update the database port in your local config settings to 5433? Please double-check the change before saving - we don't want any typos causing connection issues.

Let me know on Slack once you've made the update so I can track who's ready for the migration.

Thanks,
Bob
DevOps Team
